description: Quizlet is an online learning platform for creating, finding, and studying flashcards, study guides, practice tests, and other educational content. It serves students and teachers across many subjects and exam-preparation use cases.
summary: Quizlet exposes an OAuth-protected MCP server at https://api.quizlet.com/v4/partner/v1/mcp; no public REST/GraphQL API or CLI documentation was found in the reviewed Quizlet pages.
